title: Single dose perioperative intravesical instillation of gemcitabine versus mitomycin-C following resection of non-muscle invasive bladder cancer: A randomized controlled trial.
abstract: Immediate intravesical chemotherapy reduces recurrence in non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC). Common agents currently used are mitomycin C (MMC) and gemcitabine. Gemcitabine was shown to reduce recurrence by 20% when compared to saline in the SWOG S0337 trial. There is no study that compares gemcitabine with MMC as an immediate intravesical agent in NMIBC.
